items.title: Bantham Beach
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.summary: South Devon surf spot • Beginner to Intermediate
items.content:
One of South Devon’s best-known surf beaches, offering approachable waves on smaller days and more punch when swell fills Bigbury Bay.

  • Vibe: Scenic, popular and classic South Devon
  • Experience level: Beginner to Intermediate
  • Best conditions: South-west groundswell; lighter northerly/easterly winds; check estuary currents
  • Access: Beach access from car park and village approach
  • Parking: Paid car park near beach

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Bigbury-on-Sea
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.summary: South Devon surf spot • Beginner to Intermediate
items.content:
A broad sandy beach facing Burgh Island with manageable surf on good days. Useful for learners and relaxed sessions when the swell is not too heavy.

  • Vibe: Open, scenic and family-friendly
  • Experience level: Beginner to Intermediate
  • Best conditions: South-west swell; light northerly winds; mid tide often useful
  • Access: Easy beach access from seafront
  • Parking: Paid parking above/near beach

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Challaborough Bay
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.content:
A small bay that can produce fun, more powerful waves than nearby beginner beaches. Better for confident surfers when conditions pick up.

  • Vibe: Compact, punchy and sheltered by cliffs
  • Experience level: Intermediate
  • Best conditions: South-west swell; clean with northerly winds; check rocks and tide
  • Access: Access from holiday park/beach area
  • Parking: Paid/holiday park area parking options

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Thurlestone Sands
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.summary: South Devon surf spot • Beginner to Intermediate
items.content:
A scenic beach that can work when South Devon has enough swell. Usually more relaxed than the better-known spots nearby.

  • Vibe: Quiet, open and scenic
  • Experience level: Beginner to Intermediate
  • Best conditions: South-west swell; light offshore winds; best on clean smaller days
  • Access: Access from local car parks and coastal paths
  • Parking: Paid/local parking options

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: South Milton Sands
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.summary: South Devon surf spot • Beginner to Intermediate
items.content:
A broad, scenic beach near Thurlestone that can offer gentle waves when swell reaches the bay. A good scenic check rather than a high-consistency spot.

  • Vibe: Natural, peaceful and scenic
  • Experience level: Beginner to Intermediate
  • Best conditions: South-west swell; light north/east winds; check tide and rocks
  • Access: Access via National Trust/local parking and beach paths
  • Parking: Paid/National Trust parking nearby

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.
items.address: South Milton Sands, South Devon, UK

items.title: Mothecombe Beach
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.summary: South Devon surf spot • Beginner to Intermediate
items.content:
A beautiful, more tucked-away beach that can pick up surf in the right conditions. Good for quieter sessions when swell and access align.

  • Vibe: Quiet, sheltered and natural
  • Experience level: Beginner to Intermediate
  • Best conditions: South-west swell; clean in north/east winds; check access times and tide
  • Access: Access through estate/beach paths; seasonal restrictions may apply
  • Parking: Paid/private parking options

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Wonwell Beach
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.content:
A quieter spot near the Erme estuary where conditions are tide-sensitive. Best for surfers who are happy to explore and assess conditions carefully.

  • Vibe: Remote, estuary-influenced and peaceful
  • Experience level: Intermediate
  • Best conditions: South-west swell with suitable tide; check estuary currents
  • Access: Walk-in access; tide and river conditions matter
  • Parking: Limited village/local parking

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Hope Cove
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.summary: South Devon surf spot • Beginner to Intermediate
items.content:
A sheltered cove that needs the right swell to work. More of a scenic option for small fun waves than a high-consistency surf beach.

  • Vibe: Sheltered, pretty and village-based
  • Experience level: Beginner to Intermediate
  • Best conditions: Larger south-west swell; light offshore winds; smaller, sheltered waves
  • Access: Easy village access to beach areas
  • Parking: Village paid parking options

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: North Sands, Salcombe
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.content:
A sheltered Salcombe beach that may offer small waves in the right conditions. Better for relaxed water time than serious surf.

  • Vibe: Sheltered, scenic and gentle
  • Experience level: Beginner
  • Best conditions: Larger south/south-west swell; light winds; small clean days
  • Access: Easy access from Salcombe road and beach
  • Parking: Limited nearby parking

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.
items.address: North Sands, Salcombe, South Devon, UK

items.title: Beer Point
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.summary: South Devon surf spot • Intermediate to Advanced
items.content:
A more specialised East Devon spot that can work in specific conditions. Not a routine beginner beach and requires careful local assessment.

  • Vibe: East Devon point-style and condition-dependent
  • Experience level: Intermediate to Advanced
  • Best conditions: Strong groundswell with suitable wind and tide; check rocks
  • Access: Access from Beer village/coast paths
  • Parking: Village parking options

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Paignton Sands
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.content:
A sheltered town beach that can occasionally produce small rideable waves. Good as an easy-access check in rare suitable conditions.

  • Vibe: Accessible, sheltered and family-focused
  • Experience level: Beginner
  • Best conditions: Larger swell events; cleaner with offshore/light winds
  • Access: Very easy seafront access
  • Parking: Town/seafront paid parking

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.
